purpose: Convert outfit reference images into clean attached-head creature outfit renders that preserve the Devil Scale skeleton pose, upright plantigrade stance, hand alignment, optional tail handling, and user-specified creature identity without copying the reference mannequin head.

referenceImages.description: Authoritative front pose, widened arm spacing, closed hand grouping, upright leg stance, broad upper-body scale, and full-body framing reference. Head silhouette is placement guidance only and must not be copied.

Authoritative profile silhouette for hunched upper back, forward neck/head placement, long arms, low hands, upright plantigrade legs, and foot contact. Head silhouette is placement guidance only and must not be copied.

front.label: Devil Scale Creature Front
front.description: Front-facing creature outfit render on the Devil Scale skeleton pose.

back.label: Devil Scale Creature Back
back.description: Direct rear view continuing the same Devil Scale creature outfit from the approved front view.

side.label: Devil Scale Creature Side
side.description: Direct profile side view continuing the same Devil Scale creature outfit.
